$comment: It enforces the whitespace/encoding hygiene the .clang-format / cmake-format
formatters do NOT cover: a final newline, no trailing whitespace, UTF-8, and
LF line endings — across every text file in the repo (README, YAML, JSON,
scripts, ...), not just the C/C++ sources.
Indentation is intentionally left to the dedicated formatters: both
clang-format and cmake-format indent with tabs but ALIGN continuation lines
with spaces, which this checker's indent_style=tab rule cannot express. So
the indentation check is disabled here and clang-format / cmake-format remain
the source of truth for it.
